name: Bellevue Life Sciences Acquisition Corp. Rights
summary: Bellevue Life Sciences Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. SPACs do not have commercial operations. They are formed to raise capital through an initial public offering (IPO) for the purpose of acquiring an existing company.
